'Heroes in public, lovers in private."

‎

‎

‎

You and Nejire have known each other since kindergarten. The two of you are almost opposite people, with you being the most serious and of few words, and she the most lively and chatty. But, that was what made the friendship of the two of you interesting. And over time, this feeling of friendship blossomed into something more complex. And as you can see, the two of you are dating in secret.
